GTL Each Loop.description: GTL each block – iterates over an array of items

GTL If Condition.description: GTL if block – renders content when the condition is truthy

GTL If/Else Condition.description: GTL if/else block – renders one branch based on a condition

GTL Switch.description: GTL switch block – matches a variable against case values

GTL Datasource (Query).description: GTL query datasource – runs a SQL query to populate data

GTL Datasource (Inline).description: GTL inline datasource – defines data directly in the template

GTL Datasource (Variable).description: GTL variable datasource – reads data from a subscriber attribute or DE field containing JSON

GTL Output Variable.description: GTL output expression – renders a variable value
